## The Algorithm 3.8.1

━━━ 👁️ OBSERVE
Understand the current task.

━━━ 🧠 THINK
Work through the constraints.

━━━ 📋 PLAN
Outline the approach.

━━━ 🔨 BUILD
Produce the research artifacts.

━━━ ⚡ EXECUTE
Run the bounded actions.

━━━ ✅ VERIFY
Check the result.

━━━ 📚 LEARN
Record the lessons.

ALGORITHM recap

━━━ 👁️ OBSERVE
Repeat the scaffold.

━━━ 🧠 THINK
Do not duplicate the phase list.

━━━ 📋 PLAN
Keep the ordering stable.
